name: Mobile Ad Verification & Creative Intelligence
description: See exactly what ads appear from a real 4G/5G mobile device in any country. Verify geo-targeted ads, spy on competitor creatives, detect ad fraud. Three query types: search ads, display ads, advertiser lookup.
longDescription: Ad verification from real mobile carrier IPs. Shows paid search ads, display/banner ads, and advertiser creative inventories as seen by a real mobile user — not a datacenter bot that gets blocked or served sanitized content. Three endpoints: search_ads (what Google ads show for a query in a country), display_ads (what banner/display ads appear on any URL), advertiser (what a specific brand is running via Google Ads Transparency Center). The ad verification market is $4.8B growing to $15.9B by 2033 — enterprise solutions charge $50K+/year. This brings it to $0.01-$0.02/check.

pricing.comparison: GeoEdge: $50K+/year. DoubleVerify: $100K+/year. IAS: $75K+/year. SerpAPI ad scraping: $0.10+/query (datacenter IPs get blocked or fake results). Our mobile carrier IPs see authentic ad serving at $0.01-0.02/query.

whyMobileProxy: Ad networks serve dramatically different creatives based on IP type. Datacenter IPs get either blocked entirely or served low-quality/house ads that don't reflect real targeting. Google's real-time bidding system reserves premium geo-targeted ads exclusively for requests from real mobile carrier IPs (T-Mobile, Verizon, AT&T). Without a real carrier IP, you cannot verify whether your geo-targeted ad is actually appearing to your intended audience.
limitations: Google Ads Transparency Center may rate-limit frequent advertiser lookups
Display ad detection depends on page load speed (timeout: 15s)
Some ad networks use obfuscated markup that reduces detection accuracy
Rate limited to 20 requests/minute per client IP
